name: software-project-team
description: 13 specialized agents for production-grade full-stack software projects: .NET 9 API + Flutter + React + Postgres + RabbitMQ + Redis + Elasticsearch + MinIO.

agents.name: api-agent
agents.description: .NET Minimal API specialist — Vertical Slice + Clean Architecture + martinothamar/Mediator

agents.name: socket-agent
agents.description: SignalR bridge — real-time WebSocket + JWT + internal endpoints

agents.name: worker-agent
agents.description: Cronos-driven background jobs — calls API via X-Internal-Token

agents.name: flutter-agent
agents.description: Flutter mobile — Riverpod + go_router + dio + i18n (iOS + Android)

agents.name: react-agent
agents.description: React admin panel — Vite + TypeScript + Tailwind + Zustand + React Query + i18next

agents.name: infra-agent
agents.description: Docker Compose topology, Dockerfile.dev patterns, healthchecks, env var wiring

agents.name: database-agent
agents.description: PostgreSQL + EF Core 9 specialist — migrations, interceptors, query performance

agents.name: redis-agent
agents.description: Redis specialist — refresh tokens, cache, idempotency, dynamic settings

agents.name: rmq-agent
agents.description: RabbitMQ specialist — fanout exchanges, DLX topology, consumer patterns

agents.name: code-reviewer
agents.description: Pre-merge code review — correctness, style, security, test coverage

agents.name: project-reviewer
agents.description: Cross-cutting project review — architecture, naming, dependency direction

agents.name: design-system-agent
agents.description: Design tokens, component library, theming, dark-mode support

skills.name: create-new-project
skills.description: /create-new-project [Name] — 5-phase scaffold: gather info, create structure, build, /verify-system (mandatory), git init. Tailored to this team's .NET + Flutter + React + Docker stack.

skills.name: verify-system
skills.description: /verify-system — 4-level end-to-end health check for this team's stack (containers, ports, app health, pipelines: logging/email/auth/socket/worker/redis/storage + audit bonus)

skills.name: design-screen
skills.description: /design-screen start "<desc>" / done <handoff-url> — orchestrates Claude Design loop. start: gathers requirements, writes intent.md, gives prompt. done: fetches handoff, briefs flutter/react agent.
